name: ip-network-ai
description: Ip Network Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: parse_ip
tools.description: Parse and analyze an IP address (v4 or v6).

tools.name: subnet_calculator
tools.description: Calculate subnet details from CIDR notation (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24).

tools.name: cidr_to_range
tools.description: Convert CIDR notation to IP range with detailed info.

tools.name: dns_lookup_data
tools.description: Perform DNS lookup for a hostname.
